pages.intent: Landing page that communicates the core value proposition: capture a thought in under 3 seconds, let Xura classify and route it, all on-device with no cloud processing.
pages.title: Xura - Zero-Friction Thoughts

pages.intent: Explain the key capabilities of Xura to prospective users: instant voice capture, on-device transcription and classification, smart routing via notifications, supported integrations (free and Pro), the inbox fallback, widget and Action Button support, and the Pro subscription.
pages.title: Features

pages.intent: Help users get started and troubleshoot common issues: granting microphone and speech permissions, setting up integrations, understanding the inbox, managing the Pro subscription, and where to get further help.
pages.title: Support

pages.intent: State clearly that all transcription and classification is on-device, no audio or transcript data is sent to any server, what data is stored locally via SwiftData, and the conditions under which a thought leaves the device (only on explicit user action to an integration).
pages.title: Privacy Policy
